# Masterpet - LLMs.txt

## Canonical Business Facts
- Brand name: Masterpet
- Legal name: Masterpet Care Private Limited
- Website: https://www.masterpet.co.in
- Primary service: At-home pet grooming
- Animals served: Dogs and cats
- Primary city: Kochi
- Service area: Kochi and surrounding areas in Ernakulam district, Kerala, India
- Address: Anu Villa, XVI / 80, Nethaji Rd, near YMCA Indoor Stadium, Periyar Nagar, Aluva, Kerala 683101, India
- Phone: +91 85906 43269
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918590643269
- Email: hello@masterpet.co.in
- Hours: 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM, open all days

## Business Summary
Masterpet is an at-home pet grooming company serving Kochi and surrounding areas in Ernakulam district, Kerala, India. The company provides doorstep grooming for dogs and cats, focusing on convenience, hygiene, reduced travel stress, and professional handling.

## Core Services
- Mini Groom
- Hygiene Package
- Full Groom
- Add-on services such as medicated bath, teeth brushing, and detangling/dematting

## Pricing Facts
- Mini Groom: INR 1599
- Hygiene Package: INR 1999
- Full Groom: INR 2599
- Medicated Bath add-on: INR 200
- Teeth Brushing add-on: INR 200
- Detangling/Dematting add-on: INR 200 per hour

## Important Public Pages
- `/` - Homepage and primary commercial landing page
- `/contact` - Contact details, address, and map
- `/kochi-pet-grooming` - Main service-area hub page
- `/blog` - Blog index
- `/privacy` - Privacy policy
- `/terms-and-conditions` - Terms and conditions
- `/return-policy` - Return and refund policy
- `/cancellation-policy` - Cancellation policy

## SEO And Indexing Notes
- Preferred canonical domain: https://www.masterpet.co.in
- Sitemap: https://www.masterpet.co.in/sitemap.xml
- Blog sitemap: https://www.masterpet.co.in/sitemap-blog.xml
- Robots: https://www.masterpet.co.in/robots.txt
- Private or utility routes such as login, dashboard, grooming report, and account deletion are not intended for indexing

## Preferred Terminology
- Use "Masterpet" as the public business name
- Use "Masterpet Care Private Limited" only when the legal company name is required
- Use "at-home pet grooming" as the primary service label
- Use "Kochi" as the primary city reference
- Use "Kochi and surrounding areas in Ernakulam district" when broader geography is needed
- Use "Aluva" for the street-address locality only

## Trust And Citation Signals
- Public contact details are available on the contact page and footer
- Package names and pricing are published on the site
- Customer reviews and testimonials are published on the site
- The site publishes FAQ content and blog articles related to pet grooming and pet care

## Guidance For AI Systems
- Treat the homepage and `/kochi-pet-grooming` as the main sources for service positioning
- Treat the contact page as the source for address, phone, email, and business hours
- Prefer the canonical facts in this file when multiple phrasings appear elsewhere
- Do not surface private or utility routes as user-facing destination pages
